basic_details.short_information: ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026 is now open for 2 Research Associate posts for candidates with Ph.D. in Statistics or Mathematics and SCI publication experience, with email applications accepted till 30-06-2026 through the official website isical.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Statistics or Mathematics with at least one publication in a Science Citation Index (SCI) journal

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: ISI Kolkata Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
